title: Shop for a cause this Saturday
description: GEORGE NEWS - If you're looking for...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - If you're looking for something to do tomorrow, Saturday 3 May, head to the trees along Arbour Road (just across from Rocket) for a morning of fun, bargains and giving back at the Rocket Market.


> Set beneath the shady trees near the bike park, this family-friendly market promises a vibrant mix of stalls, irresistible deals and a laid-back vibe.


Each edition of the market supports a local animal rescue organisation, and this time, the spotlight falls on ODIN (Oudtshoorn Dogs in Need), an organisation urgently in need of community support.

Browse the stalls, enjoy the atmosphere and support a very worthy cause. It's all happening this Saturday - don't miss it!

A variety of stalls will be exhibiting their produce and items for sale.‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
